programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia And finally Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition TV-14-LV

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down and when bullets fly it starts to look like they may never come back home Back in LA Frankies wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gunsmoke S10E06 Take Her Shes Cheap
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S10E06 Take Her Shes Cheap

programme.title: Bonanza 301
programme.desc: Bonanza 301

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Special Agents Jim West and Artemus Gordon meet a mysterious woman with a toy chicken who has important information about the dastardly Count Manzeppi West and Gordon notice the Count disguised as an organ grinder outside their window when a monkey tosses in a smoke bomb When the smoke clears the woman is gone but the toy chicken remains Manzeppi is after the chicken which contains the mystical Philosophers Stone The stone will turn anything near it to gold in the light of a full moon

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing the police through a forest Dr Kimble finds an armed criminal with a bullet wound The criminal guides him to a cabin owned by a woman who is suspicious of their stories

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike battles spies in an underwater maze of caves

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A movie producer hires Mike Nelson to help in filming an underwater escape scene in The Counte of Monte Cristo Mikes problems include a reckless movie star and a jealous stand-in

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A propaganda broadcaster for the Nazis is really a British agent sending coded messages through her over the air piano playing to help the allies

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Since they failed to find anything suspicious in the basement of the old house David tells Burke and Dr Woodard about the secret room in the mausoleum

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: A psychiatrist analyzes David Elizabeth informs Burke that theres a clause in an old family will which prevents her from selling him the house Dr Woodard decides to take another look at the mausoleum

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A pop radio psychiatrist is horrified because one of her call-in listeners commits murder while she is on the air and Nick helps her get her confidence back

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki investigate the apparent suicides of a handful of ballet dancers and soon learn that they may be linked to a rare music box

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A married woman is into watching game shows She gets onto one which becomes a nightmare wherein if she answers correctly her husband dies She wins 1000000 then travels back in time warning herself to get rid of the money or else her husband will die

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Crypt 306
programme.desc: Crypt 306

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans 312
programme.desc: Hogans 312

programme.title: Hogans 307
programme.desc: Hogans 307

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale Molly and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton at bay while they arrange for an against-the-rules wedding for Christy and his fiancee - Lieutenant Gloria Winters

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is in desperate need of character witnesses to testify on his behalf at his parking ticket trial

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys teach a wealthy couple the joys of simple living

programme.title: Smart 423
programme.desc: Smart 423

programme.title: Smart 512
programme.desc: Smart 512

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and suffers amnesia As he struggles to remember who he is and why two men are attempting to kill him he falls in love with Gypsy and works the bumper car pavilion of her uncles carnival

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitchs former rival Albert Romero from the Baywatch episode Red Wind suddenly shows up and asks Mitch and Garner to help him search for his wife Bobbie who he believes was kidnapped by the Mafia

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer but his legal troubles are worse than expected Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car Then Sonia and Froy discover one debtors alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret And finally the teams attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas he considers taking matters into his own hands Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle Then when one woman behaves like a child Matt puts her in timeout but worries he may have gone too far And finally Lou Matt and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Truckers form a mile-long convoy in support of a truckers vendetta with an abusive sheriff - Based on the country song of the same title by CW McCall

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes sonic experiment designed to kill Alec cross-fires and turns him into his opposite - a kind generous considerate man horrified at his treatment of Alec However if he can stop the experiment it may change him b

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will becomes involved with a couple who hold a map that Arcane has a keen interest in obtaining

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The tall and imposing Magus arrives on board the ship He claims godlike powers namely that he effected the Creation But he is now disillusioned with the way that Life has progressed and wishes to start again He plans to mate Helena and Tony and Maya with Koenig But of course he is not God but a renegade cosmic sorcerer and quite illogical at that who needs to be controlled

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Neeg is killed by a bacteria that is deadly to both Taelons and Humans If it spreads it might be disastrous A new racist group attacks a community center

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Many centuries ago one alien ship crashed on earth The surviving aliens were defeated by a local Indian tribe The modern day aliens attempt to acquire the ship to assist in their subjugation of the planet

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In a politically turbulent Mexico full of revolutionaries Cheyenne encounters a sexy blond pickpocket singer in Rio Hondo She arrived on the stage with a local rancher who owes Cheyenne money from a cattle deal and he wants to be paid

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Detectives Stone and Keller investigate how a contract killer obtained inside information on the movement of a mob witness

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Hitchhiker

programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
